title: CL Educate Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: CL Educate Digital Technologies is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the CL Educate Digital Technologies family as a Subject Matter Expert in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About CL Educate Digital Technologies:
CL Educate Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CL Educate Digital Technologies!
